reviews.comment:
Si Capussoto hiciese un sketch acá se llamaria "Estación LHDP".  Lo peor que te puede pasar después de un viaje largo. Tardan literalmente 10min en cargar nafta por auto. Se te va la vida esperando

(Translated by Google)
If Capussoto did a sketch here, it would be called "LHDP Station." The worst thing that can happen after a long trip. It literally takes 10 minutes to fill up a car with gas. You're wasting your life waiting.

reviewReply.comment: Lamentamos su experiencia

reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/14276783751635166039/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUR0dmUzSmpRRRAB

reviews.comment:
Mala atención. Se nota que saben que la gente para obligada porque es la primera estación de servicio de bandera reconocida después del camino del desierto. Pero 25 km. más adelante hay otra YPF nueva que es espectacular. Lamentable que ACA permita baños sucios, falta de aire para cubiertas y mala atención.

(Translated by Google)
Poor service. It's obvious they know people are forced to stop because it's the first well-known branded gas station after the desert road. But 25 km further on there's another, brand-new YPF that's fantastic. It's a shame that ACA allows dirty bathrooms, underinflated tires, and poor service.

reviewReply.comment: Lamentamos su experiencia Martin

reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/14276783751635166039/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUR0b1pESkh3EAE

reviews.comment:
Muy mala atención, compramos en el full 19:30 preguntamos si había hamburguesas y decían que no las podían cocinar porque eran pocos empleados, cuando la cantidad de gente que había se fue, empezaron a cocinar otras cosas sabiendo que íbamos a comprar las hamburguesas. Una lastima no poder cenar después de un viaje tan largo.

(Translated by Google)
Very poor service. We bought at the full restaurant at 7:30 p.m. We asked if they had hamburgers, and they said they couldn't cook them because they were short on staff. When the crowd left, they started cooking other things, knowing we were going to buy hamburgers. It's a shame not to be able to eat dinner after such a long trip.

reviewReply.comment: Lamentamos su experiencia

reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/14276783751635166039/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUR0Z3R2YWxRRRAB
